toolCall.name: run_command
toolCall.argumentsJson:
{"CommandLine":"# Download Discrete Mathematics papers - MASSIVE collection!
$base = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/puneet-chandna/VIT-PYQPs-Paaji/main/all%20papers/Discrete%20mathematics"
$dest = "D:\Study Papers\Joel\Discrete_Mathematics_and_Graph_Theory"

# CAT-1 papers
$cat1 = @(
    @("Discrete%20Maths%20CAT%201.pdf", "Discrete_Maths_CAT1.pdf"),
    @("Discrete%20mathematics%20qp%20CAT%201.pdf", "Discrete_Math_CAT1_qp.pdf"),
    @("discrete%20p%20cat%201%20qp.pdf", "Discrete_CAT1_qp2.pdf"),
    @("MAT1014%20CAT1%20WIN%202019-20%20A1.pdf", "MAT1014_CAT1_WIN2019-20_A1.pdf"),
    @("MAT1014%20CAT1%20WIN%202019-20%20A2.pdf", "MAT1014_CAT1_WIN2019-20_A2.pdf"),
    @("MAT1014%20CAT1%20WIN%202020.pdf", "MAT1014_CAT1_WIN2020.pdf")
)
foreach ($f in $cat1) {
    Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/$($f[0])" -OutFile "$dest\CAT1\$($f[1])"
    Write-Host "Downloaded CAT1: $($f[1])"
}

# CAT-2 papers
$cat2 = @(
    @("DMGT%20cat2%20qp.pdf", "DMGT_CAT2_qp.pdf"),
    @("Discrete%20Mathematics%20CAT%202.pdf", "Discrete_Math_CAT2.pdf"),
    @("Discrete%20z%20CAT%202.pdf", "Discrete_CAT2_z.pdf"),
    @("discrete%20mathematics%20CAT2%20qp.pdf", "Discrete_Math_CAT2_qp2.pdf"),
    @("MAT1014%20CAT%202.pdf", "MAT1014_CAT2.pdf"),
    @("MAT1014%20CAT%202%20FALL.pdf", "MAT1014_CAT2_FALL.pdf"),
    @("MAT1014%20CAT2%20A2%20FALL.pdf", "MAT1014_CAT2_A2_FALL.pdf"),
    @("MAT1014%20CAT2%20FALL.pdf", "MAT1014_CAT2_FALL2.pdf")
)
foreach ($f in $cat2) {
    Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/$($f[0])" -OutFile "$dest\CAT2\$($f[1])"
    Write-Host "Downloaded CAT2: $($f[1])"
}

Write-Host "`nDiscrete Math CAT papers downloaded!"","Cwd":"D:\","WaitMsBeforeAsync":10000,"toolAction":"Downloading Discrete Math papers","toolSummary":"Discrete Math batch download"}
